nasb.text: Thus says the Lord God, “Now I will spread My net over you With a company of many peoples, And they shall lift you up in My net.

esv.text: Thus says the Lord God: I will throw my net over you with a host of many peoples, and they will haul you up in my dragnet.

cnv.text: 主耶和華這樣說： 我必用多國的群眾， 把我的網撒在你身上， 他們必用我的網把你拉上來。

ccb.text: 主耶和华说， 我要差遣多国组成的大军， 用我的网把你拉上来，
